records.ety: [Pref. tri- + Gr. <?/ a family, class. So called in allusion to its containing three phosphates.]

defs: A mineral of a grayish-green or bluish color, consisting of the phosphates of iron, manganese, and lithia.
notes: ☞ A salmon-colored or clove-brown variety containing but little iron is known as lithiophilite.
